india_trends.title: Goods moved from SEZs to domestic markets treated as imports; duty drawback applicable on re-exports
india_trends.summary: New Delhi has clarified a key point for exporters. Goods moved from SEZ units to the domestic market, after paying duties, will now be considered imported if re-exported. This means duty drawback will be available. This move brings uniformity and reduces confusion for businesses. It supports exporte

india_trends.title: Punjab & Sind Bank plans Rs 3,000-cr share sale this fiscal
india_trends.summary: Public sector lender Punjab & Sind Bank is eying to mobilise up to Rs 3,000 crore via share sale on a private placement basis in a bid to meet the minimum public shareholding (MPS) norms of market regulator Sebi.

india_trends.title: Castrol India Q4 Results: Profit rises 4% to Rs 242 cr; revenue up 9%
india_trends.summary: Lubricant maker Castrol India on Tuesday reported a 4 per cent growth in its profit after tax at Rs 242 crore in the January-March quarter of 2026 compared to the same period last year.

india_trends.title: Ather Energy among 9 small-cap stocks that hit 52-week highs & rallied up to 52% in a month

india_trends.title: Small cars strike back: Maruti Suzuki bets on mass mobility while costs squeeze fourth quarter profits
india_trends.summary: Maruti Suzuki is prioritizing small cars for growth in India. This strategy aims for volume in a price-sensitive market. india_trends.title: 9 stocks with rising promoter pledges in March '26
india_trends.summary: Promoter pledges rose across several Nifty500 stocks in March 2026 quarter, signaling increased borrowing against shares, raising investor concerns over financial stress, liquidity needs, and potential downside risks if prices decline.

india_trends.title: REC Q4 Results: Cons PAT falls 22% YoY to Rs 3,375 crore, revenue declines 5%
india_trends.summary: State-run REC reported a 22% year-on-year drop in Q4 profit to Rs 3,375 crore, with revenue declining 5%. Sequential performance also weakened, while expenses increased. The company maintained strong loan assets and announced a final dividend, taking total FY26 payout higher.

india_trends.title: Stock split alert! This smallcap stock just went up 14% in two days; do you own?
india_trends.summary: Air compressors-maker Kirloskar Pneumatic Company has announced a 1:2 stock split for its eligible shareholders, along with a final dividend of Rs 8.5 per share and Q4 results.

india_trends.title: Eternal eyeing $1 billion in adjusted EBITDA by FY29, says Deepinder Goyal in shareholder letter
india_trends.summary: Eternal CEO Deepinder Goyal says the company reached adjusted EBITDA profitability in FY24 after 16 years and targets $1 billion by FY29, driven by NOV growth, resilient India-first operations, and scalable ecosystems supporting millions of customers, partners, and workers nationwide.
